1вҶ’# MindLang: Bytecode and Virtual Machine
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## 1. Instruction Set: 45 Opcodes
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’### 1.1 Data Movement (5 opcodes)
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Operands | Stack Effect | Description |
     8вҶ’|--------|------|----------|---------------|-------------|
     9вҶ’| 0x00 | LOAD_QUERY | addr: u32 | вҶ’ q | Load query embedding from heap address |
    10вҶ’| 0x01 | LOAD_CONST | const_id: u32 | вҶ’ value | Load constant (weight matrix, bias, etc.) |
    11вҶ’| 0x02 | STORE_LOCAL | slot: u8 | value вҶ’ | Store value in local register |
    12вҶ’| 0x03 | LOAD_LOCAL | slot: u8 | вҶ’ value | Load value from local register |
    13вҶ’| 0x04 | HEAP_LOAD | addr: u32, size: u32 | вҶ’ tensor | Load tensor from heap |
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’### 1.2 Encoding (3 opcodes)
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    18вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    19вҶ’| 0x10 | ENCODE_Q | q вҶ’ z | q вҲҲ в„қ^d вҶ’ z вҲҲ в„қ^m via encoder |
    20вҶ’| 0x11 | NORM_L2 | v вҶ’ v_norm | L2 normalization: v / вҖ–vвҖ–вӮӮ |
    21вҶ’| 0x12 | DROPOUT | v, rate вҶ’ v' | Dropout regularization (rate вҲҲ [0, 1]) |
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’### 1.3 Activation Functions (4 opcodes)
    24вҶ’
    25вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    26вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    27вҶ’| 0x20 | RELU | v вҶ’ max(0, v) | Rectified linear unit |
    28вҶ’| 0x21 | TANH | v вҶ’ tanh(v) | Hyperbolic tangent |
    29вҶ’| 0x22 | SIGMOID | v вҶ’ Пғ(v) | Logistic sigmoid |
    30вҶ’| 0x23 | SOFTMAX | v вҶ’ softmax(v) | Softmax normalization |
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’### 1.4 Arithmetic (6 opcodes)
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    35вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    36вҶ’| 0x30 | SCALE | v, Оұ вҶ’ ОұВ·v | Scalar multiplication |
    37вҶ’| 0x31 | ADD | v1, v2 вҶ’ v1+v2 | Vector addition |
    38вҶ’| 0x32 | SUB | v1, v2 вҶ’ v1-v2 | Vector subtraction |
    39вҶ’| 0x33 | HADAMARD | v1, v2 вҶ’ v1вҠҷv2 | Element-wise multiplication |
    40вҶ’| 0x34 | MATMUL | M, v вҶ’ MВ·v | Matrix-vector product |
    41вҶ’| 0x35 | OUTER | u, v вҶ’ uвҠ—v | Outer product |
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’### 1.5 Projections (3 opcodes)
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    46вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    47вҶ’| 0x40 | PROJECT_A | z вҶ’ z_a | Analytical path: z_a = W_aВ·z + b_a |
    48вҶ’| 0x41 | PROJECT_B | z вҶ’ z_b | Creative path: z_b = W_bВ·z + b_b + Оө |
    49вҶ’| 0x42 | PROJECT_C | z вҶ’ z_c | Empirical path: z_c = W_cВ·z + b_c |
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’### 1.6 Path Forking (1 opcode)
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    54вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    55вҶ’| 0x50 | FORK_PATHS | z вҶ’ [z_a, z_b, z_c] | Launch 3 parallel threads |
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’### 1.7 Synchronization (2 opcodes)
    58вҶ’
    59вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    60вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    61вҶ’| 0x51 | BARRIER | [z_a, z_b, z_c] вҶ’ [z_a, z_b, z_c] | Join threads, synchronization point |
    62вҶ’| 0x52 | THREAD_YIELD | none | Yield control to other threads |
    63вҶ’
    64вҶ’### 1.8 Weight Computation (2 opcodes)
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    67вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    68вҶ’| 0x60 | COMPUTE_WEIGHTS | z вҶ’ [Оұ, ОІ, Оі] | Attention: [Оұ,ОІ,Оі] = softmax(WВ·z+b) |
    69вҶ’| 0x61 | TEMP_SCALE | logits, T вҶ’ logits/T | Temperature scaling: logits/T |
    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’### 1.9 Ensemble (3 opcodes)
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    74вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    75вҶ’| 0x70 | ENSEMBLE | [z_a,z_b,z_c],[Оұ,ОІ,Оі] вҶ’ z_ens | z_ens = ОұВ·z_a + ОІВ·z_b + ОіВ·z_c |
    76вҶ’| 0x71 | CONTRIB_A | z_a, Оұ вҶ’ ОұВ·z_a | Compute analytical contribution |
    77вҶ’| 0x72 | CONTRIB_B | z_b, ОІ вҶ’ ОІВ·z_b | Compute creative contribution |
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’### 1.10 Critique (3 opcodes)
    80вҶ’
    81вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    82вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    83вҶ’| 0x80 | CRITIQUE | z_ens вҶ’ Оҙ | Confidence scoring: Оҙ = crit(z_ens) вҲҲ [-1,1] |
    84вҶ’| 0x81 | CRIT_CHECK | Оҙ, low, high вҶ’ bool | Check if Оҙ вҲҲ [low, high] |
    85вҶ’| 0x82 | RETRY_WEIGHTS | Оҙ вҶ’ [Оұ',ОІ',Оі'] | Recompute weights if low confidence |
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’### 1.11 Sampling (4 opcodes)
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    90вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
    91вҶ’| 0x90 | LOGITS_TO_PROB | z_ens вҶ’ p | p = softmax(WВ·z_ens) вҲҲ [0,1]^|V| |
    92вҶ’| 0x91 | FILTER_THRESHOLD | p, Оё вҶ’ candidates | Filter: {i : p_i > Оё} |
    93вҶ’| 0x92 | SAMPLE | candidates, p_filt вҶ’ token | Sample from filtered distribution |
    94вҶ’| 0x93 | GREEDY | p вҶ’ argmax(p) | Greedy selection (max probability) |
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’### 1.12 Detokenization (2 opcodes)
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
    99вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
   100вҶ’| 0xA0 | DECODE_MORPHEME | z_ens вҶ’ morphemes | Extract morphemes from latent |
   101вҶ’| 0xA1 | COMPOSE_KOREAN | morphemes вҶ’ korean_text | Generate Korean surface form |
   102вҶ’
   103вҶ’### 1.13 Control Flow (4 opcodes)
   104вҶ’
   105вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Stack | Description |
   106вҶ’|--------|------|-------|-------------|
   107вҶ’| 0xB0 | JUMP | target: u32 | Unconditional jump to instruction |
   108вҶ’| 0xB1 | JUMP_IF_TRUE | target: u32, cond | Jump if condition true |
   109вҶ’| 0xB2 | LOOP_START | iter_count вҶ’ | Begin loop (for iteration) |
   110вҶ’| 0xB3 | LOOP_END | вҶ’ | End loop, decrement counter |
   111вҶ’
   112вҶ’### 1.14 Debugging & Admin (2 opcodes)
   113вҶ’
   114вҶ’| Opcode | Name | Description |
   115вҶ’|--------|------|-------------|
   116вҶ’| 0xF0 | DEBUG_PRINT | Print stack/registers to stdout |
   117вҶ’| 0xF1 | HALT | Terminate execution |
   118вҶ’
   119вҶ’---
   120вҶ’
   121вҶ’**Total: 45 opcodes**
   122вҶ’
   123вҶ’## 2. Bytecode Format
   124вҶ’
   125вҶ’### 2.1 Instruction Encoding
   126вҶ’
   127вҶ’```
   128вҶ’Single instruction (1-5 bytes):
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’Byte 0:          opcode (0x00-0xF1)
   131вҶ’Bytes 1-4:       operands (variable length)
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’Examples:
   134вҶ’  RELU:            [0x20]                          (no operand)
   135вҶ’  LOAD_QUERY:      [0x00] [addr: 4 bytes]         (4-byte address)
   136вҶ’  JUMP:            [0xB0] [target: 4 bytes]       (jump address)
   137вҶ’  LOAD_CONST:      [0x01] [const_id: 4 bytes]     (constant ID)
   138вҶ’```
   139вҶ’
   140вҶ’### 2.2 Program Structure
   141вҶ’
   142вҶ’```
   143вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   144вҶ’в”Ӯ Header (16 bytes)           в”Ӯ
   145вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   146вҶ’в”Ӯ Magic: "MIND" (4 bytes)     в”Ӯ
   147вҶ’в”Ӯ Version: u32 (1.0)          в”Ӯ
   148вҶ’в”Ӯ EntryPoint: u32 (offset)    в”Ӯ
   149вҶ’в”Ӯ Size: u32 (bytecode length) в”Ӯ
   150вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   151вҶ’в”Ӯ Constants (variable)        в”Ӯ
   152вҶ’в”Ӯ   Weight matrices           в”Ӯ
   153вҶ’в”Ӯ   Biases                    в”Ӯ
   154вҶ’в”Ӯ   Thresholds                в”Ӯ
   155вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   156вҶ’в”Ӯ Bytecode Instructions       в”Ӯ
   157вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   158вҶ’в”Ӯ Jump Table (optional)       в”Ӯ
   159вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
   160вҶ’```
   161вҶ’
   162вҶ’## 3. Stack Layout
   163вҶ’
   164вҶ’### 3.1 Stack Organization
   165вҶ’
   166вҶ’```
   167вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ Top (SP)
   168вҶ’в”Ӯ Return address               в”Ӯ
   169вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   170вҶ’в”Ӯ Local variables (caller)     в”Ӯ
   171вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   172вҶ’в”Ӯ Parameters (from FORK_PATHS) в”Ӯ
   173вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   174вҶ’в”Ӯ Temporary values             в”Ӯ
   175вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   176вҶ’в”Ӯ Current computation          в”Ӯ
   177вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ Bottom (BP)
   178вҶ’```
   179вҶ’
   180вҶ’### 3.2 Register Allocation
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’```
   183вҶ’Registers (fast access):
   184вҶ’  r0: current z
   185вҶ’  r1: z_a (from thread 1)
   186вҶ’  r2: z_b (from thread 2)
   187вҶ’  r3: z_c (from thread 3)
   188вҶ’  r4: weights [Оұ, ОІ, Оі]
   189вҶ’  r5: z_ens
   190вҶ’  r6: Оҙ (confidence)
   191вҶ’  r7: temporary
   192вҶ’```
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’## 4. Memory Layout
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’### 4.1 Memory Segments
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’```
   199вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 0x0000
   200вҶ’в”Ӯ Code segment (bytecode)     в”Ӯ
   201вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө code_size
   202вҶ’в”Ӯ Data segment (constants)    в”Ӯ
   203вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө code_size + data_size
   204вҶ’в”Ӯ Stack (grows upward)        в”Ӯ
   205вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
   206вҶ’в”Ӯ ...                         в”Ӯ
   207вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө heap_base
   208вҶ’в”Ӯ Heap (grows downward)       в”Ӯ
   209вҶ’в”Ӯ   Query embeddings q        в”Ӯ
   210вҶ’в”Ӯ   Large tensors             в”Ӯ
   211вҶ’в”Ӯ   Intermediate buffers      в”Ӯ
   212вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ heap_max
   213вҶ’```
   214вҶ’
   215вҶ’### 4.2 Tensor Storage
   216вҶ’
   217вҶ’```
   218вҶ’Tensor layout in heap (row-major):
   219вҶ’  For matrix M вҲҲ в„қ^(mГ—n):
   220вҶ’    [M[0,0], M[0,1], ..., M[0,n-1],
   221вҶ’     M[1,0], M[1,1], ..., M[1,n-1],
   222вҶ’     ...
   223вҶ’     M[m-1,0], M[m-1,1], ..., M[m-1,n-1]]
   224вҶ’
   225вҶ’  Dimensions: 2 u32 integers (m, n)
   226вҶ’  Data: mВ·n f64 values
   227вҶ’```
   228вҶ’
   229вҶ’## 5. Execution Model
   230вҶ’
   231вҶ’### 5.1 Sequential Execution
   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’```
   234вҶ’Pseudocode:
   235вҶ’  PC = 0                        // program counter
   236вҶ’  SP = stack_base               // stack pointer
   237вҶ’  BP = stack_base               // base pointer
   238вҶ’
   239вҶ’  while PC < program_size:
   240вҶ’    opcode = bytecode[PC]
   241вҶ’    PC += 1
   242вҶ’
   243вҶ’    match opcode:
   244вҶ’      0x20 (RELU):
   245вҶ’        v = pop_stack()
   246вҶ’        result = max(0, v)
   247вҶ’        push_stack(result)
   248вҶ’        PC += 0
   249вҶ’
   250вҶ’      0x00 (LOAD_QUERY):
   251вҶ’        addr = read_u32(bytecode, PC)
   252вҶ’        PC += 4
   253вҶ’        q = heap[addr : addr + query_dim]
   254вҶ’        push_stack(q)
   255вҶ’
   256вҶ’      ... (other opcodes)
   257вҶ’```
   258вҶ’
   259вҶ’### 5.2 Parallel Execution (FORK_PATHS)
   260вҶ’
   261вҶ’```
   262вҶ’Normal execution:
   263вҶ’  PCвӮҖ вҶ’ PCвӮҒ вҶ’ PCвӮӮ вҶ’ ... (sequential)
   264вҶ’
   265вҶ’At FORK_PATHS:
   266вҶ’  Thread 0 (PC_current + 1):  execute PROJECT_A
   267вҶ’  Thread 1 (new):            execute PROJECT_B
   268вҶ’  Thread 2 (new):            execute PROJECT_C
   269вҶ’
   270вҶ’  All three threads run in parallel.
   271вҶ’
   272вҶ’At BARRIER:
   273вҶ’  Wait until all three threads reach BARRIER
   274вҶ’  Collect results [z_a, z_b, z_c]
   275вҶ’  Continue with Thread 0 (or any)
   276вҶ’```
   277вҶ’
   278вҶ’### 5.3 Conditional Execution
   279вҶ’
   280вҶ’```
   281вҶ’At CRIT_CHECK:
   282вҶ’  if condition(Оҙ) is true:
   283вҶ’    continue
   284вҶ’  else:
   285вҶ’    execute RETRY_WEIGHTS
   286вҶ’    jump back to recompute ensemble
   287вҶ’
   288вҶ’Pattern:
   289вҶ’  CRITIQUE             // Оҙ = crit(z_ens)
   290вҶ’  CRIT_CHECK Оҙ         // check confidence
   291вҶ’  JUMP_IF_TRUE good    // if confident, jump to 'good'
   292вҶ’  RETRY_WEIGHTS        // else recompute
   293вҶ’  JUMP retry_ensemble  // jump back
   294вҶ’good:
   295вҶ’  SAMPLE               // continue to sampling
   296вҶ’```
   297вҶ’
   298вҶ’## 6. Example Bytecode Programs
   299вҶ’
   300вҶ’### 6.1 Simple Query вҶ’ Z вҶ’ Output
   301вҶ’
   302вҶ’```
   303вҶ’Entry point (0x00):
   304вҶ’  0x00: LOAD_QUERY      (addr=0x100)      вҶ’ q on stack
   305вҶ’  0x10: ENCODE_Q                          вҶ’ z on stack
   306вҶ’  0x11: NORM_L2                           вҶ’ z_norm
   307вҶ’  0x02: STORE_LOCAL     (slot=0)          z_norm in r0
   308вҶ’
   309вҶ’  0x50: FORK_PATHS                        [z_a, z_b, z_c] in parallel
   310вҶ’  0x51: BARRIER                           wait for all threads
   311вҶ’  0x60: COMPUTE_WEIGHTS                   вҶ’ [Оұ, ОІ, Оі]
   312вҶ’  0x70: ENSEMBLE                          вҶ’ z_ens
   313вҶ’  0x80: CRITIQUE                          вҶ’ Оҙ
   314вҶ’  0x81: CRIT_CHECK      Оҙ, -0.3, 1.0     check confidence
   315вҶ’  0xB1: JUMP_IF_TRUE    (target=0x40)    if high confidence
   316вҶ’
   317вҶ’  [Low confidence path]
   318вҶ’  0x82: RETRY_WEIGHTS                     вҶ’ [Оұ', ОІ', Оі']
   319вҶ’  0xB0: JUMP            (target=0x28)    back to ensemble
   320вҶ’
   321вҶ’  [High confidence path]
   322вҶ’  0x40: 0x90: LOGITS_TO_PROB              вҶ’ p
   323вҶ’  0x91: FILTER_THRESHOLD (Оё=0.05)        вҶ’ candidates
   324вҶ’  0x92: SAMPLE                            вҶ’ token_idx
   325вҶ’  0xA0: DECODE_MORPHEME                   вҶ’ morphemes
   326вҶ’  0xA1: COMPOSE_KOREAN                    вҶ’ korean_text
   327вҶ’  0xF1: HALT
   328вҶ’```
   329вҶ’
   330вҶ’### 6.2 Multi-token Generation Loop
   331вҶ’
   332вҶ’```
   333вҶ’Entry point (0x00):
   334вҶ’  ... [initialization as above, up to z_ens] ...
   335вҶ’
   336вҶ’  0x03: LOAD_LOCAL      (slot=0)          вҶ’ num_tokens = 10
   337вҶ’  0xB2: LOOP_START      (iter_count=10)   begin loop
   338вҶ’
   339вҶ’  [Loop body: generate one token]
   340вҶ’  0x90: LOGITS_TO_PROB                    вҶ’ p_i
   341вҶ’  0x91: FILTER_THRESHOLD                  вҶ’ candidates_i
   342вҶ’  0x92: SAMPLE                            вҶ’ token_i
   343вҶ’  0xA0: DECODE_MORPHEME                   вҶ’ morpheme_i
   344вҶ’  0xA1: COMPOSE_KOREAN                    вҶ’ append to output
   345вҶ’
   346вҶ’  [Optional: update z for next token based on output]
   347вҶ’  0x03: LOAD_LOCAL      (slot=1)          вҶ’ z_prev
   348вҶ’  0x31: ADD             (z_ens, context)  вҶ’ z_ens_new
   349вҶ’  0xB3: LOOP_END                          decrement counter, back to 0xB2
   350вҶ’
   351вҶ’  0xF0: DEBUG_PRINT                       print output
   352вҶ’  0xF1: HALT
   353вҶ’```
   354вҶ’
   355вҶ’## 7. Instruction Execution Examples
   356вҶ’
   357вҶ’### 7.1 ENCODE_Q
   358вҶ’
   359вҶ’```
   360вҶ’Before: stack = [q вҲҲ в„қ^d, ...]
   361вҶ’Operation:
   362вҶ’  z = W_enc В· q + b_enc
   363вҶ’  where W_enc вҲҲ в„қ^(mГ—d), b_enc вҲҲ в„қ^m
   364вҶ’After: stack = [z вҲҲ в„қ^m, ...]
   365вҶ’Cost: O(dВ·m) operations
   366вҶ’```
   367вҶ’
   368вҶ’### 7.2 ENSEMBLE
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’```
   371вҶ’Before: stack = [Оұ, ОІ, Оі, z_a, z_b, z_c, ...]
   372вҶ’Operation:
   373вҶ’  z_ens = Оұ В· z_a + ОІ В· z_b + Оі В· z_c
   374вҶ’  pop: Оі, z_c, ОІ, z_b, Оұ, z_a
   375вҶ’  compute: 3m float operations
   376вҶ’After: stack = [z_ens вҲҲ в„қ^m, ...]
   377вҶ’Cost: O(m) operations
   378вҶ’```
   379вҶ’
   380вҶ’### 7.3 FORK_PATHS
   381вҶ’
   382вҶ’```
   383вҶ’Before: stack = [z, ...]
   384вҶ’Operation:
   385вҶ’  thread0: push(z); execute PROJECT_A
   386вҶ’  thread1: push(z); execute PROJECT_B  [new thread]
   387вҶ’  thread2: push(z); execute PROJECT_C  [new thread]
   388вҶ’After: stack0 = [z_a, ...], stack1 = [z_b, ...], stack2 = [z_c, ...]
   389вҶ’Cost: O(mВІ) for projection, parallelized
   390вҶ’Wait: BARRIER synchronization point
   391вҶ’```
   392вҶ’
   393вҶ’## 8. Virtual Machine Performance
   394вҶ’
   395вҶ’### 8.1 Instruction Timing (Approximate)
   396вҶ’
   397вҶ’```
   398вҶ’Memory operations:     1-3 cycles
   399вҶ’Arithmetic (+,-,*):    1-4 cycles
   400вҶ’Activation (relu):     1-2 cycles
   401вҶ’Softmax:              O(|V|) cycles вүҲ 100-1000 cycles
   402вҶ’Matrix multiply:       O(nВ·m) cycles вүҲ 1000s cycles
   403вҶ’FORK_PATHS:           0 cycles (spawn threads)
   404вҶ’BARRIER:              variable (wait for slowest)
   405вҶ’```
   406вҶ’
   407вҶ’### 8.2 Throughput
   408вҶ’
   409вҶ’```
   410вҶ’Single-token generation:
   411вҶ’  Query encoding:     dВ·m/1000 вүҲ 1 ms       (1M ops / GHz)
   412вҶ’  3-path parallel:    mВІ/3000 вүҲ 0.3 ms
   413вҶ’  Ensemble:           m/1000 вүҲ 0.001 ms
   414вҶ’  Critique:           m/1000 вүҲ 0.001 ms
   415вҶ’  Sampling:           |V|/1000 вүҲ 0.1 ms
   416вҶ’  Detokenization:     m/1000 вүҲ 0.001 ms
   417вҶ’  в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
   418вҶ’  Total per token:    вүҲ 1.4 ms
   419вҶ’
   420вҶ’Multi-token (10 tokens):
   421вҶ’  With parallelism:   вүҲ 1.4 + 9*0.4 вүҲ 5 ms
   422вҶ’  Without:            вүҲ 1.4 + 9*1.4 вүҲ 13.6 ms
   423вҶ’  Speedup:            вүҲ 2.7x
   424вҶ’```
   425вҶ’
   426вҶ’## 9. Exception Handling
   427вҶ’
   428вҶ’### 9.1 Runtime Errors
   429вҶ’
   430вҶ’```
   431вҶ’Error codes:
   432вҶ’  0x00: Stack overflow
   433вҶ’  0x01: Stack underflow
   434вҶ’  0x02: Heap out of bounds
   435вҶ’  0x03: Invalid opcode
   436вҶ’  0x04: Timeout (max iterations exceeded)
   437вҶ’  0x05: Division by zero
   438вҶ’  0x06: Invalid thread state
   439вҶ’```
   440вҶ’
   441вҶ’### 9.2 Error Recovery
   442вҶ’
   443вҶ’```
   444вҶ’try-catch bytecode:
   445вҶ’  [instruction that might fail]
   446вҶ’  JUMP_IF_ERROR (target=error_handler)
   447вҶ’
   448вҶ’  error_handler:
   449вҶ’    LOAD_CONST (error_msg_id)
   450вҶ’    PRINT_ERROR
   451вҶ’    JUMP (cleanup)
   452вҶ’```

    46вҶ’## 2. Memory Model
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’### 2.1 Memory Segments
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’```
    51вҶ’Address space (typical 64-bit):
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’0x00000000
    54вҶ’в”Ӯ
    55вҶ’в”ңв”Җ Code segment (read-only)
    56вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Bytecode instructions

    58вҶ’в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ String literals

    60вҶ’в”Ӯ
    61вҶ’в”ңв”Җ Data segment (read-write)
    62вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Initialized globals
    63вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Precomputed tables
    64вҶ’в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Cached values
    65вҶ’в”Ӯ  Size: typically 1 MB - 10 MB
    66вҶ’в”Ӯ
    67вҶ’в”ңв”Җ Stack (grows upward)
    68вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Function frames
    69вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Local variables
    70вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Return addresses
    71вҶ’в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Temporary values

   128вҶ’## 3. Execution Model
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’### 3.1 Single-Threaded Execution
   131вҶ’
   132вҶ’```
   133вҶ’Program counter (PC): current instruction address
   134вҶ’Stack pointer (SP): top of stack
   135вҶ’Base pointer (BP): frame base for function
   136вҶ’
   137вҶ’Execution loop:
   138вҶ’  while (PC < program_end):
   139вҶ’    opcode = fetch_opcode(PC)
   140вҶ’    operand_count = opcode_operands[opcode]
   141вҶ’
   142вҶ’    match opcode:
   143вҶ’      case ENCODE_Q:
   144вҶ’        q = pop_stack()
   145вҶ’        z = encoder.forward(q)  // neural computation
   146вҶ’        push_stack(z)
   147вҶ’
   148вҶ’      case ENSEMBLE:
   149вҶ’        z_c = pop_stack()
   150вҶ’        z_b = pop_stack()
   151вҶ’        z_a = pop_stack()
   152вҶ’        gamma = pop_stack()
   153вҶ’        beta = pop_stack()
   154вҶ’        alpha = pop_stack()
   155вҶ’        z_ens = alpha*z_a + beta*z_b + gamma*z_c
   156вҶ’        push_stack(z_ens)
   157вҶ’
   158вҶ’      ... (other opcodes)
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’    PC += opcode_size[opcode]
   161вҶ’```
   162вҶ’
   163вҶ’### 3.2 Control Flow
   164вҶ’
   165вҶ’```
   166вҶ’Sequential:
   167вҶ’  PCвӮҖ вҶ’ PCвӮҒ вҶ’ PCвӮӮ вҶ’ ... (normal increment)
   168вҶ’
   169вҶ’Branching:
   170вҶ’  At JUMP_IF_TRUE:
   171вҶ’    if condition:
   172вҶ’      PC = target_address
   173вҶ’    else:
   174вҶ’      PC += instruction_size
   175вҶ’
   176вҶ’Looping:
   177вҶ’  LOOP_START: save counter, PC_start
   178вҶ’  LOOP_END:   counter -= 1; if counter > 0: PC = PC_start
   179вҶ’
   180вҶ’Function calls (future):
   181вҶ’  CALL:       push return address, PC = function entry
   182вҶ’  RETURN:     pop return address, PC = return address
   183вҶ’```
   184вҶ’
   185вҶ’### 3.3 Error Handling
   186вҶ’
   187вҶ’```
   188вҶ’At runtime, errors can occur:
   189вҶ’
   190вҶ’1. Stack underflow
   191вҶ’   Action: raise StackUnderflowError, halt
   192вҶ’
   193вҶ’2. Invalid memory access
   194вҶ’   Action: raise SegmentationFault, halt
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’3. Numerical error (NaN, Inf)
   197вҶ’   Action: propagate as invalid value
   198вҶ’          or raise FloatingPointError
   199вҶ’
   200вҶ’4. Timeout (max instructions exceeded)
   201вҶ’   Action: raise TimeoutError, halt
   202вҶ’
   203вҶ’5. Resource exhaustion (heap full)
   204вҶ’   Action: raise OutOfMemoryError, halt
   205вҶ’
   206вҶ’Exception handling:
   207вҶ’  try {
   208вҶ’    execute_bytecode()
   209вҶ’  } catch (error):
   210вҶ’    print_error(error)
   211вҶ’    cleanup()
   212вҶ’    exit(error_code)
   213вҶ’```
   214вҶ’
   215вҶ’## 4. Stack-Based Computation
   216вҶ’
   217вҶ’### 4.1 Stack as Computation Storage
   218вҶ’
   219вҶ’```
   220вҶ’Example: compute z_ens = ОұВ·z_a + ОІВ·z_b + ОіВ·z_c
   221вҶ’
   222вҶ’Before:
   223вҶ’  Stack: [... , Оі, z_c, ОІ, z_b, Оұ, z_a]  (bottom to top)
   224вҶ’
   225вҶ’Execute: CONTRIB_A (compute ОұВ·z_a)
   226вҶ’  POP z_a, Оұ
   227вҶ’  result = Оұ * z_a
   228вҶ’  PUSH ОұВ·z_a
   229вҶ’
   230вҶ’After CONTRIB_A:
   231вҶ’  Stack: [... , Оі, z_c, ОІ, z_b, ОұВ·z_a]
   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’Execute: CONTRIB_B
   234вҶ’After CONTRIB_B:
   235вҶ’  Stack: [... , Оі, z_c, ОІВ·z_b, ОұВ·z_a]
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’Execute: CONTRIB_C
   238вҶ’After CONTRIB_C:
   239вҶ’  Stack: [... , ОіВ·z_c, ОІВ·z_b, ОұВ·z_a]
   240вҶ’
   241вҶ’Execute: ADD ADD (combine three)
   242вҶ’After:
   243вҶ’  Stack: [... , z_ens]
   244вҶ’```
   245вҶ’
   246вҶ’### 4.2 Register Optimization
   247вҶ’
   248вҶ’```
   249вҶ’Some values cached in registers for speed:
   250вҶ’
   251вҶ’r0: current latent (z)
   252вҶ’r1: path A result (z_a)
   253вҶ’r2: path B result (z_b)
   254вҶ’r3: path C result (z_c)
   255вҶ’r4: weights [Оұ, ОІ, Оі]
   256вҶ’r5: ensemble result (z_ens)
   257вҶ’r6: confidence (Оҙ)
   258вҶ’r7: general purpose
   259вҶ’
   260вҶ’Register assignments:
   261вҶ’  REGISTER_ALLOC r0 = z      // persistent
   262вҶ’  REGISTER_ALLOC r1 = z_a
   263вҶ’  REGISTER_ALLOC r2 = z_b    // after FORK_PATHS
   264вҶ’  REGISTER_ALLOC r3 = z_c
   265вҶ’
   266вҶ’  // Use MOV instruction to transfer between stack and registers
   267вҶ’  MOV_TO_REG r0, stack       // copy top of stack to r0
   268вҶ’  MOV_FROM_REG stack, r0     // copy r0 to stack
   269вҶ’```
   270вҶ’
   271вҶ’## 5. Thread and Parallelism Management
   272вҶ’
   273вҶ’### 5.1 Thread Pool
   274вҶ’
   275вҶ’```
   276вҶ’Global thread pool at startup:
   277вҶ’
   278вҶ’num_worker_threads = min(num_cpu_cores, max_threads)
   279вҶ’
   280вҶ’Worker threads:
   281вҶ’  [Thread 0] - idle, waiting for work
   282вҶ’  [Thread 1] - idle
   283вҶ’  [Thread 2] - idle
   284вҶ’  ...
   285вҶ’
   286вҶ’Work queue (thread-safe):
   287вҶ’  Queue: [Task, Task, Task, ...]
   288вҶ’
   289вҶ’Each worker loops:
   290вҶ’  while not_terminated:
   291вҶ’    task = work_queue.dequeue()
   292вҶ’    if task:
   293вҶ’      execute(task)
   294вҶ’    else:
   295вҶ’      sleep()
   296вҶ’```
   297вҶ’
   298вҶ’### 5.2 FORK_PATHS Execution
   299вҶ’
   300вҶ’```
   301вҶ’Main thread at FORK_PATHS:
   302вҶ’  1. Save current state
   303вҶ’  2. Create three tasks:
   304вҶ’     Task_A: execute PROJECT_A with register[r0] as input
   305вҶ’     Task_B: execute PROJECT_B
   306вҶ’     Task_C: execute PROJECT_C
   307вҶ’  3. Enqueue all three tasks
   308вҶ’  4. Yield until BARRIER
   309вҶ’
   310вҶ’Worker threads:
   311вҶ’  Thread 1: takes Task_A, computes z_a, stores in r1, signal completion
   312вҶ’  Thread 2: takes Task_B, computes z_b, stores in r2, signal completion
   313вҶ’  Thread 3: takes Task_C, computes z_c, stores in r3, signal completion
   314вҶ’
   315вҶ’Main thread at BARRIER:
   316вҶ’  Wait for all three signals
   317вҶ’  Continue with r0, r1, r2, r3 all populated
   318вҶ’```
   319вҶ’
   320вҶ’### 5.3 Synchronization Primitives
   321вҶ’
   322вҶ’```
   323вҶ’Barrier:
   324вҶ’  barrier_init(count=3)
   325вҶ’  thread_1 вҶ’ barrier_wait()  // blocks
   326вҶ’  thread_2 вҶ’ barrier_wait()  // blocks
   327вҶ’  thread_3 вҶ’ barrier_wait()  // blocks until all 3 arrive
   328вҶ’  // All released
   329вҶ’  All proceed simultaneously
   330вҶ’
   331вҶ’Lock (for shared resources):
   332вҶ’  lock.acquire()
   333вҶ’  critical_section()
   334вҶ’  lock.release()
   335вҶ’
   336вҶ’Atomic operations:
   337вҶ’  atomic_add(x, 5)   // thread-safe x += 5
   338вҶ’  atomic_swap(ptr1, ptr2)
   339вҶ’```
   340вҶ’
   341вҶ’### 5.4 Work Stealing
   342вҶ’
   343вҶ’```
   344вҶ’If one thread finishes early:
   345вҶ’  1. Check its local queue (no work)
   346вҶ’  2. Try to steal from other threads' queues
   347вҶ’  3. Remove half of stolen thread's work
   348вҶ’  4. Execute stolen work
   349вҶ’
   350вҶ’Benefit: better load balancing
   351вҶ’```
   352вҶ’
   353вҶ’## 6. Garbage Collection (Optional)
   354вҶ’
   355вҶ’### 6.1 Mark-and-Sweep GC
   356вҶ’
   357вҶ’```
   358вҶ’GC phases:
   359вҶ’
   360вҶ’1. Mark phase:
   361вҶ’   - Start from roots (stack, registers)
   362вҶ’   - DFS/BFS through reachable objects
   363вҶ’   - Mark each reachable object
   364вҶ’
   365вҶ’2. Sweep phase:
   366вҶ’   - Iterate through all heap objects
   367вҶ’   - If not marked: deallocate
   368вҶ’   - If marked: unmark for next cycle
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’3. Compaction (optional):
   371вҶ’   - Move remaining objects to eliminate fragmentation
   372вҶ’   - Update all pointers
   373вҶ’```
   374вҶ’
   375вҶ’### 6.2 When to GC
   376вҶ’
   377вҶ’```
   378вҶ’Trigger GC when:
   379вҶ’  - heap_used > heap_threshold (e.g., 80%)
   380вҶ’  - explicit call: gc()
   381вҶ’  - periodic (every N instructions)
   382вҶ’
   383вҶ’GC stops:
   384вҶ’  - Pause all worker threads
   385вҶ’  - Mark and sweep
   386вҶ’  - Resume threads
   387вҶ’```
   388вҶ’

   470вҶ’## 9. Resource Limits
   471вҶ’
   472вҶ’### 9.1 Configurable Limits
   473вҶ’
   474вҶ’```
   475вҶ’max_stack_size: 10 MB
   476вҶ’  вҶ’ Prevents stack overflow
   477вҶ’  вҶ’ Raises error if exceeded
   478вҶ’
   479вҶ’max_heap_size: 500 MB
   480вҶ’  вҶ’ Prevents unbounded memory growth
   481вҶ’  вҶ’ Triggers GC more frequently
   482вҶ’
   483вҶ’max_instructions: 10^7
   484вҶ’  вҶ’ Prevents infinite loops
   485вҶ’  вҶ’ Typical for 10 tokens: 10k instructions
   486вҶ’
   487вҶ’max_threads: 16
   488вҶ’  вҶ’ Limits thread pool size
   489вҶ’  вҶ’ Balance between parallelism and overhead
   490вҶ’
   491вҶ’max_execution_time: 60 seconds
   492вҶ’  вҶ’ Wall-clock timeout
   493вҶ’  вҶ’ Prevents hanging
   494вҶ’```
   495вҶ’
   496вҶ’### 9.2 Enforcement
   497вҶ’
   498вҶ’```
   499вҶ’Check at each opcode:
   500вҶ’  if instructions_executed > max_instructions:
   501вҶ’    raise TimeoutError("Instruction limit exceeded")
   502вҶ’
   503вҶ’Check on stack push:
   504вҶ’  if SP - BP > max_stack_size:
   505вҶ’    raise StackOverflowError()
   506вҶ’
   507вҶ’Check on heap allocation:
   508вҶ’  if heap_used > max_heap_size:
   509вҶ’    raise OutOfMemoryError()
   510вҶ’```

     5вҶ’### 1.1 Fork-Join Pattern
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’```

    15вҶ’               в””в”Җ Thread 3: PROJECT_C вҶ’ z_c

    85вҶ’## 2. Path Scheduling
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’### 2.1 Scheduling Strategy
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’```
    90вҶ’Goal: minimize total execution time
    91вҶ’
    92вҶ’Strategy 1: Static scheduling
    93вҶ’  Always assign:
    94вҶ’    Thread 1 вҶ’ PROJECT_A
    95вҶ’    Thread 2 вҶ’ PROJECT_B
    96вҶ’    Thread 3 вҶ’ PROJECT_C
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’Strategy 2: Load-aware scheduling
    99вҶ’  Estimate cost: cost_A, cost_B, cost_C
   100вҶ’  Assign fastest to slowest path:
   101вҶ’    If cost_A > cost_B > cost_C:
   102вҶ’      Thread 1 вҶ’ PROJECT_A
   103вҶ’      Thread 2 вҶ’ PROJECT_B
   104вҶ’      Thread 3 вҶ’ PROJECT_C
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’Strategy 3: Dynamic work-stealing
   107вҶ’  All three threads start from work queue
   108вҶ’  Whichever thread is free takes next task
   109вҶ’```
   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’### 2.2 Critical Path Analysis
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’```
   114вҶ’For each path:
   115вҶ’  PROJECT_A: matrix multiply W_a вҲҲ в„қ^(mГ—m), input z вҲҲ в„қ^m
   116вҶ’    Time: ~mВІ / (clock * parallelism)
   117вҶ’    Parallelizable: yes (SIMD, cache-friendly)
   118вҶ’
   119вҶ’  PROJECT_B: same as A, but with noise addition
   120вҶ’    Time: ~mВІ + Оө  (slightly more for noise generation)
   121вҶ’    Parallelizable: yes
   122вҶ’
   123вҶ’  PROJECT_C: same as A, but with sigmoid activation
   124вҶ’    Time: ~mВІ + activation_cost
   125вҶ’    Parallelizable: yes
   126вҶ’
   127вҶ’Critical path: max(T_A, T_B, T_C) вүҲ mВІ / clock_cycles
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’Example with m = 512, clock = 1 GHz:
   130вҶ’  T_A = 512ВІ / (1000 * 8) вүҲ 33 cycles вүҲ 33 ns (per SIMD operation)
   131вҶ’  If not parallelized: 512ВІ / 1000 вүҲ 260 cycles вүҲ 260 ns
   132вҶ’  Speedup: 3x achieved
   133вҶ’```

   135вҶ’## 3. Work Stealing
   136вҶ’
   137вҶ’### 3.1 Work-Stealing Deque
   138вҶ’
   139вҶ’```
   140вҶ’Each worker thread has a local deque (double-ended queue):
   141вҶ’
   142вҶ’Thread 1:
   143вҶ’  Local work: [Task_A1, Task_A2, Task_A3]
   144вҶ’  Insert at tail, remove from head
   145вҶ’
   146вҶ’If Thread 1 becomes idle:
   147вҶ’  1. Check its own deque (empty)
   148вҶ’  2. Try to steal from Thread 2's deque tail
   149вҶ’     вҶ’ Successfully steal Task_B3
   150вҶ’  3. Execute Task_B3
   151вҶ’  4. Continue stealing if more idle
   152вҶ’
   153вҶ’Advantages:
   154вҶ’  - Minimal contention (only steal from tail)
   155вҶ’  - LIFO cache locality (recently added tasks are cache-hot)
   156вҶ’  - Load balancing automatically emerges
   157вҶ’```
   158вҶ’
   159вҶ’### 3.2 Stealing Protocol
   160вҶ’
   161вҶ’```
   162вҶ’procedure try_steal():
   163вҶ’  for each worker_thread in other_threads:
   164вҶ’    if worker_thread.deque.size() > 1:
   165вҶ’      task = worker_thread.deque.steal_from_tail()
   166вҶ’      if task acquired successfully:
   167вҶ’        return task
   168вҶ’  return None
   169вҶ’
   170вҶ’procedure worker_loop():
   171вҶ’  while not_terminated:
   172вҶ’    task = deque.pop_from_head()
   173вҶ’    if task:
   174вҶ’      execute(task)
   175вҶ’    else:
   176вҶ’      task = try_steal()
   177вҶ’      if task:
   178вҶ’        execute(task)
   179вҶ’      else:
   180вҶ’        sleep(backoff_time)
   181вҶ’```
   182вҶ’
   183вҶ’### 3.3 Performance Impact
   184вҶ’
   185вҶ’```
   186вҶ’Scenario 1: Balanced load
   187вҶ’  Each path takes ~33 ns
   188вҶ’  Total: 33 ns
   189вҶ’  No stealing needed
   190вҶ’
   191вҶ’Scenario 2: Imbalanced load
   192вҶ’  PROJECT_A: 50 ns
   193вҶ’  PROJECT_B: 30 ns
   194вҶ’  PROJECT_C: 20 ns
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’  Timeline:
   197вҶ’    t=0ms:   all start
   198вҶ’    t=20ns:  Thread 3 finishes, idles
   199вҶ’    t=20-30ns: Thread 3 steals from Thread 2
   200вҶ’    t=30ns:  Thread 2 finishes
   201вҶ’    t=30-50ns: Thread 2 steals from Thread 1
   202вҶ’    t=50ns:  all complete
   203вҶ’
   204вҶ’  With stealing: 50 ns
   205вҶ’  Without stealing: 50 ns (still critical path limited)
   206вҶ’  Improvement: 0% (critical path unchanged)
   207вҶ’
   208вҶ’  But if we had more tasks:
   209вҶ’    With stealing: better utilization across tasks
   210вҶ’```
   211вҶ’
   212вҶ’## 4. Synchronization Barriers
   213вҶ’
   214вҶ’### 4.1 Barrier Implementation
   215вҶ’
   216вҶ’```
   217вҶ’Barrier with N threads:
   218вҶ’
   219вҶ’struct Barrier {
   220вҶ’  target_count: u32 = N,
   221вҶ’  current_count: u32 = 0,
   222вҶ’  generation: u32 = 0,
   223вҶ’  lock: Mutex,
   224вҶ’  cond: ConditionVariable,
   225вҶ’}
   226вҶ’
   227вҶ’procedure barrier_wait():
   228вҶ’  lock.acquire()
   229вҶ’
   230вҶ’  current_count += 1
   231вҶ’
   232вҶ’  if current_count == target_count:
   233вҶ’    // last thread to arrive
   234вҶ’    generation += 1
   235вҶ’    current_count = 0
   236вҶ’    cond.broadcast()      // wake all waiters
   237вҶ’    lock.release()
   238вҶ’    return                // proceed
   239вҶ’
   240вҶ’  else:
   241вҶ’    // wait for others
   242вҶ’    gen_at_entry = generation
   243вҶ’    while generation == gen_at_entry:
   244вҶ’      cond.wait(lock)     // release lock, sleep
   245вҶ’
   246вҶ’    lock.release()
   247вҶ’    return                // proceed
   248вҶ’```
   249вҶ’
   250вҶ’### 4.2 Efficiency
   251вҶ’
   252вҶ’```
   253вҶ’In MindLang: BARRIER always has exactly 3 threads
   254вҶ’
   255вҶ’Cost:
   256вҶ’  - Atomic increment: ~1 cycle
   257вҶ’  - Lock acquire/release: ~10-50 cycles (if contended)
   258вҶ’  - Condition variable: ~5-20 cycles
   259вҶ’  - Total: ~50 cycles вүҲ 50 ns
   260вҶ’
   261вҶ’Compared to path computation: 33 ns
   262вҶ’Overhead: ~50% of critical path
   263вҶ’
   264вҶ’Optimization: custom 3-thread barrier
   265вҶ’  struct Barrier3 {
   266вҶ’    flags: [u32; 3] = [0, 0, 0],    // per-thread flag
   267вҶ’    counter: atomic<u32> = 0,
   268вҶ’  }
   269вҶ’
   270вҶ’  procedure barrier_wait(thread_id):
   271вҶ’    flags[thread_id] = 1
   272вҶ’    atomic_add(counter, 1)
   273вҶ’    while counter != 3: spin()      // busy wait
   274вҶ’    counter = 0
   275вҶ’    flags[thread_id] = 0
   276вҶ’```
   277вҶ’
   278вҶ’## 5. Join Operation
   279вҶ’
   280вҶ’### 5.1 Join Synchronization
   281вҶ’
   282вҶ’```
   283вҶ’At ENSEMBLE opcode:
   284вҶ’  All three results must be available:
   285вҶ’    r1: z_a (computed by Thread 1)
   286вҶ’    r2: z_b (computed by Thread 2)
   287вҶ’    r3: z_c (computed by Thread 3)
   288вҶ’
   289вҶ’Join ensures:
   290вҶ’  вҲҖ paths: computation completed
   291вҶ’  вҲҖ results: written to registers
   292вҶ’  вҲҖ memory: synchronized (visible to all threads)
   293вҶ’
   294вҶ’Memory barrier (fence):
   295вҶ’  Before ensemble computation, ensure:
   296вҶ’    - All writes from threads visible to main thread
   297вҶ’    - No stale cached values
   298вҶ’```
   299вҶ’
   300вҶ’### 5.2 Memory Synchronization
   301вҶ’
   302вҶ’```
   303вҶ’Without synchronization:
   304вҶ’  Thread 1 writes z_a to r1 (cached in L1)
   305вҶ’  Main thread reads r1 (sees stale value)
   306вҶ’  Incorrect computation
   307вҶ’
   308вҶ’With synchronization:
   309вҶ’  Thread 1: compute z_a, write to r1, fence()
   310вҶ’  BARRIER waits for all threads
   311вҶ’  Main thread: fence(), read r1 (guaranteed fresh)
   312вҶ’  Correct computation
   313вҶ’
   314вҶ’Fence costs:
   315вҶ’  ~100 cycles on modern CPU (serializes pipeline)
   316вҶ’  But called only once per BARRIER, worth it for correctness
   317вҶ’```
   318вҶ’
   319вҶ’## 6. Critique Parallelization
   320вҶ’
   321вҶ’### 6.1 Optional Parallelism
   322вҶ’
   323вҶ’```
   324вҶ’CRITIQUE operation:
   325вҶ’  Оҙ = tanh(W_c В· z_ens + b_c)  or multi-layer
   326вҶ’
   327вҶ’Sequential:
   328вҶ’  compute(z_ens) вҶ’ Оҙ
   329вҶ’
   330вҶ’Parallel (if multi-layer):
   331вҶ’  Layer 1: hвӮҒ = WвӮҒ В· z_ens (can be parallelized)
   332вҶ’           - Partition z_ens into blocks
   333вҶ’           - Threads compute partial sums
   334вҶ’           - Reduce to final hвӮҒ
   335вҶ’
   336вҶ’  Layer 2: hвӮӮ = WвӮӮ В· hвӮҒ
   337вҶ’
   338вҶ’  Layer 3: Оҙ = tanh(WвӮғ В· hвӮӮ)
   339вҶ’
   340вҶ’But:
   341вҶ’  - Critique is inherently sequential in depth
   342вҶ’  - Can parallelize matrix operations internally (SIMD)
   343вҶ’  - Not as much opportunity as 3-way branching
   344вҶ’
   345вҶ’Decision: Keep CRITIQUE sequential for simplicity
   346вҶ’```
   347вҶ’
   348вҶ’## 7. Sampling Parallelization
   349вҶ’
   350вҶ’### 7.1 Softmax Parallelization
   351вҶ’
   352вҶ’```
   353вҶ’LOGITS_TO_PROB: p = softmax(logits)
   354вҶ’
   355вҶ’Sequential softmax:
   356вҶ’  1. Find max (sequential scan)
   357вҶ’  2. Compute exp differences (parallel)
   358вҶ’  3. Sum (parallel reduction)
   359вҶ’  4. Divide (parallel)
   360вҶ’
   361вҶ’Parallel version:
   362вҶ’  threads = ceil(|V| / block_size)
   363вҶ’  for each thread:
   364вҶ’    block_max = reduce_max(logits[block])
   365вҶ’  global_max = reduce_max(block_maxes)
   366вҶ’
   367вҶ’  for each thread:
   368вҶ’    block_sum = 0
   369вҶ’    for each element in block:
   370вҶ’      block_sum += exp(logits[i] - global_max)
   371вҶ’  global_sum = reduce_sum(block_sums)
   372вҶ’
   373вҶ’  for each thread:
   374вҶ’    for each element in block:
   375вҶ’      p[i] = exp(logits[i] - global_max) / global_sum
   376вҶ’
   377вҶ’Complexity:
   378вҶ’  Sequential: O(|V|)
   379вҶ’  Parallel: O(log |V|) with |V| processors
   380вҶ’  Practical: O(|V| / num_threads) with memory bandwidth limiting
   381вҶ’
   382вҶ’Example: |V| = 100,000
   383вҶ’  Sequential: 100k operations
   384вҶ’  Parallel (8 threads): 12.5k operations per thread + 20k reduction вүҲ 32.5k total
   385вҶ’  Speedup: ~3x
   386вҶ’```
   387вҶ’
   388вҶ’### 7.2 Threshold Filtering Parallelization
   389вҶ’
   390вҶ’```
   391вҶ’FILTER_THRESHOLD: candidates = {i : p_i > Оё}
   392вҶ’
   393вҶ’Sequential:
   394вҶ’  for each i in 0..|V|-1:
   395вҶ’    if p[i] > Оё:
   396вҶ’      candidates.push(i)
   397вҶ’
   398вҶ’Parallel:
   399вҶ’  threads = ceil(|V| / block_size)
   400вҶ’  for each thread in parallel:
   401вҶ’    local_candidates = []
   402вҶ’    for each i in thread's block:
   403вҶ’      if p[i] > Оё:
   404вҶ’        local_candidates.push(i)
   405вҶ’
   406вҶ’  // Merge local_candidates into global
   407вҶ’  candidates = concatenate(all local_candidates)
   408вҶ’
   409вҶ’Speedup: ~proportional to threads (linear)
   410вҶ’```
   411вҶ’
   412вҶ’## 8. Performance Considerations
   413вҶ’
   414вҶ’### 8.1 Overhead Analysis
   415вҶ’
   416вҶ’```
   417вҶ’Cost of parallelism:
   418вҶ’  - Thread spawning: ~1000 cycles
   419вҶ’  - Context switching: ~500 cycles
   420вҶ’  - Barrier synchronization: ~100 cycles
   421вҶ’  - Memory synchronization fence: ~100 cycles
   422вҶ’  - Total overhead: ~1700 cycles вүҲ 1.7 Ојs
   423вҶ’
   424вҶ’Path computation:
   425вҶ’  - PROJECT_A: ~512ВІ / parallelism вүҲ 33 ns
   426вҶ’  - PROJECT_B: ~33 ns
   427вҶ’  - PROJECT_C: ~33 ns
   428вҶ’
   429вҶ’Breakeven analysis:
   430вҶ’  If total path time < overhead, parallelism not worth it
   431вҶ’  33 ns << 1700 cycles вүҲ 1.7 Ојs
   432вҶ’
   433вҶ’  Solution: Batch multiple queries
   434вҶ’  Process K queries:
   435вҶ’    Parallelism overhead amortized: 1.7 Ојs / K
   436вҶ’    K=100: 17 ns overhead per query
   437вҶ’    K=100: path time 33 ns + overhead 17 ns вүҲ 50 ns total
   438вҶ’    Speedup: still ~3x
   439вҶ’```
   440вҶ’
   441вҶ’### 8.2 Memory Bandwidth
   442вҶ’
   443вҶ’```
   444вҶ’Bottleneck: loading tensors from memory
   445вҶ’
   446вҶ’PROJECT_A: load W_a (mВІ * 8 bytes) + load z (m * 8 bytes)
   447вҶ’  = 512ВІ * 8 + 512 * 8 bytes
   448вҶ’  = 2,097,152 + 4,096
   449вҶ’  вүҲ 2.1 MB
   450вҶ’
   451вҶ’Memory bandwidth (typical):
   452вҶ’  DDR4: 50 GB/s
   453вҶ’  HBM2: 250 GB/s
   454вҶ’
   455вҶ’Time to load data:
   456вҶ’  With DDR4: 2.1 MB / 50 GB/s вүҲ 42 ns
   457вҶ’  Computation time: 33 ns
   458вҶ’
   459вҶ’Computation is memory-bound! (data loading > computation)
   460вҶ’Solution: cache weights in L3 or use SIMD prefetching
   461вҶ’```
   462вҶ’
   463вҶ’### 8.3 Cache Locality
   464вҶ’
   465вҶ’```
   466вҶ’W_a stored in row-major order (cache-friendly):
   467вҶ’  [W_a[0,0], W_a[0,1], ..., W_a[0,511],
   468вҶ’   W_a[1,0], W_a[1,1], ..., W_a[1,511],
   469вҶ’   ...]
   470вҶ’
   471вҶ’Accessing z[i]:
   472вҶ’  Prefetch W_a[*, i] (column vector)
   473вҶ’  Cache line: 64 bytes = 8 f64 values
   474вҶ’  Required: 512 / 8 = 64 cache lines
   475вҶ’
   476вҶ’L1 cache: 32 KB = 512 cache lines
   477вҶ’L2 cache: 256 KB
   478вҶ’L3 cache: 8 MB
   479вҶ’
   480вҶ’For PROJECT_A:
   481вҶ’  Load W_a: 512 cache lines (not all fit in L1)
   482вҶ’  Cache misses: ~75% on repeated accesses
   483вҶ’```
   484вҶ’
   485вҶ’## 9. Synchronization Primitives Summary
   486вҶ’
   487вҶ’| Primitive | Use Case | Cost | Notes |
   488вҶ’|-----------|----------|------|-------|
   489вҶ’| Barrier | Sync after fork | 100 cy | Custom 3-thread version recommended |
   490вҶ’| Lock | Protect shared data | 10-50 cy | Rarely needed in MindLang |
   491вҶ’| Atomic ops | Counter increments | 5-10 cy | Used in work stealing |
   492вҶ’| Memory fence | Visibility guarantee | 100 cy | Required for correctness |
   493вҶ’| Condition var | Thread wakeup | 5-20 cy | Used in barrier wait |
   494вҶ’
   495вҶ’## 10. Parallelism Best Practices
   496вҶ’
   497вҶ’### 10.1 For MindLang Implementation
   498вҶ’
   499вҶ’```
   500вҶ’1. Use fork-join pattern (fixed 3-way)
   501вҶ’   вң“ simple, predictable
   502вҶ’   вң“ always has work (3 paths)
   503вҶ’   вң— fixed to 3 threads
   504вҶ’
   505вҶ’2. Minimize barrier overhead
   506вҶ’   вң“ custom 3-thread barrier
   507вҶ’   вң“ avoid multiple barriers per query
   508вҶ’
   509вҶ’3. Balance path complexity
   510вҶ’   вң“ keep PROJECT_A, B, C roughly equal time
   511вҶ’   вң“ adjust weights regularization to balance load
   512вҶ’
   513вҶ’4. Cache tensor weights
   514вҶ’   вң“ load W_a, W_b, W_c once at startup
   515вҶ’   вң“ reuse across multiple queries
   516вҶ’   вң“ fit in L3 cache if possible
   517вҶ’
   518вҶ’5. Batch queries
   519вҶ’   вң“ process multiple queries in pipeline
   520вҶ’   вң“ amortize parallelism overhead
   521вҶ’```
   522вҶ’
   523вҶ’### 10.2 Scalability Considerations
   524вҶ’
   525вҶ’```
   526вҶ’For future N-way branching (N > 3):
   527вҶ’
   528вҶ’Challenges:
   529вҶ’  - Barrier becomes O(N) cycles
   530вҶ’  - Thread pool management overhead
   531вҶ’  - Memory bandwidth scales poorly
   532вҶ’
   533вҶ’Solutions:
   534вҶ’  - Hierarchical barriers
   535вҶ’  - Task-based parallelism (instead of thread-based)
   536вҶ’  - GPU acceleration (CUDA/HIP) for large N
   537вҶ’```
   538вҶ’
   539вҶ’## 11. Parallelism Summary Table
   540вҶ’
   541вҶ’| Component | Parallelizable | Speedup | Overhead |
   542вҶ’|-----------|-----------------|---------|----------|
   543вҶ’| FORK_PATHS | yes (3-way) | 3x | ~1.7 Ојs |
   544вҶ’| PROJECT_A,B,C | yes (SIMD) | ~4-8x | low |
   545вҶ’| ENSEMBLE | no | - | ~50 ns |
   546вҶ’| CRITIQUE | partial | 1-2x | ~500 ns |
   547вҶ’| LOGITS_TO_PROB | yes (parallel reduction) | ~3-8x | ~200 ns |
   548вҶ’| FILTER_THRESHOLD | yes | ~Nx | low |
   549вҶ’| BARRIER | N/A | - | ~100 ns |
   550вҶ’
   551вҶ’**Total speedup (single query): ~2-3x**
   552вҶ’**With batching (100 queries): ~2.5-3x sustained**
   553вҶ’
   554вҶ’---
   555вҶ’

1вҶ’# MindLang: Abstract Syntax Tree (AST)
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## 1. Core Node Types
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’### 1.1 QueryNode: Input Representation
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’```typescript
     8вҶ’interface QueryNode extends Node {
     9вҶ’  type: 'QueryNode',
    10вҶ’  id: NodeId,
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’  // Query embedding from input tokens
    13вҶ’  embedding: Vec<f64>,              // q вҲҲ в„қ^d
    14вҶ’  semanticContent: string,          // original text for debugging
    15вҶ’  confidence: f64,                  // input confidence in [0, 1]
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’  // Metadata
    18вҶ’  sourceLength: number,             // |tokens| in original input
    19вҶ’  encodeTime: number,               // ms to encode
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’  // Child
    22вҶ’  next: LatentNode,
    23вҶ’}
    24вҶ’```
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’**Semantics**: Represents the initial query q from raw input. Acts as source of computation.
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’### 1.2 LatentNode: Encoded Representation
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’```typescript
    31вҶ’interface LatentNode extends Node {
    32вҶ’  type: 'LatentNode',
    33вҶ’  id: NodeId,
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’  // Latent vector from encoder
    36вҶ’  latent: Vec<f64>,                 // z вҲҲ в„қ^m
    37вҶ’  latentDim: number,                // m
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’  // Encoder parameters
    40вҶ’  encoderWeights: Matrix,           // W_enc вҲҲ в„қ^(mГ—d)
    41вҶ’  encoderBias: Vec<f64>,            // b_enc вҲҲ в„қ^m
    42вҶ’  activationFunc: 'relu' | 'tanh' | 'linear',
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’  // Reconstruction (optional)
    45вҶ’  reconstructed?: Vec<f64>,         // q_recon = D(z)
    46вҶ’  reconstructionError?: f64,        // вҖ–q - q_reconвҖ–вӮӮ
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’  // Children
    49вҶ’  paths: [PathNode_A, PathNode_B, PathNode_C],
    50вҶ’}
    51вҶ’```
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’**Semantics**: Represents z, the latent essence of the query.
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’### 1.3 PathNode: Individual Reasoning Path
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’```typescript
    58вҶ’interface PathNode extends Node {
    59вҶ’  type: 'PathNode',
    60вҶ’  id: NodeId,
    61вҶ’  pathType: 'analytical' | 'creative' | 'empirical',
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’  // Path-specific latent
    64вҶ’  output: Vec<f64>,                 // z_a or z_b or z_c
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’  // Projection parameters
    67вҶ’  projectionMatrix: Matrix,         // W_p вҲҲ в„қ^(mГ—m)
    68вҶ’  projectionBias: Vec<f64>,         // b_p вҲҲ в„қ^m
    69вҶ’  activation: 'relu' | 'tanh' | 'sigmoid' | 'linear',
    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’  // For creative path: noise
    72вҶ’  noise?: Vec<f64>,                 // Оө ~ N(0, ПғВІI)
    73вҶ’  noiseScale?: f64,
    74вҶ’
    75вҶ’  // Confidence in this path
    76вҶ’  internalScore: f64,               // вҖ–outputвҖ–ВІ or similar
    77вҶ’  estimatedAccuracy?: f64,          // [0, 1]
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’  // Parent and next
    80вҶ’  parent: LatentNode,
    81вҶ’  next: EnsembleNode,
    82вҶ’}
    83вҶ’```
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’**Semantics**: Represents each of z_a, z_b, z_c as independent reasoning branches.
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’**Parallelism**: Three PathNodes can be computed in parallel.
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’### 1.4 WeightNode: Dynamic Attention
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’```typescript
    92вҶ’interface WeightNode extends Node {
    93вҶ’  type: 'WeightNode',
    94вҶ’  id: NodeId,
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’  // Attention mechanism
    97вҶ’  attentionMatrix: Matrix,          // W_attn вҲҲ в„қ^(3Г—m)
    98вҶ’  attentionBias: Vec<f64>,          // b_attn вҲҲ в„қВі
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’  // Input and output
   101вҶ’  input: Vec<f64>,                  // z (latent from parent)
   102вҶ’  logits: Vec<f64>,                 // 3-dim vector
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’  // Final weights (simplex constrained)
   105вҶ’  weights: {
   106вҶ’    alpha: f64,                     // Оұ вҲҲ [0, 1]
   107вҶ’    beta: f64,                      // ОІ вҲҲ [0, 1]
   108вҶ’    gamma: f64,                     // Оі вҲҲ [0, 1]
   109вҶ’  },
   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’  // Interpretation
   112вҶ’  dominantPath: 'analytical' | 'creative' | 'empirical',
   113вҶ’  entropy: f64,                     // entropy of [Оұ, ОІ, Оі]
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’  // Parent
   116вҶ’  parent: LatentNode,
   117вҶ’}
   118вҶ’```
   119вҶ’
   120вҶ’**Semantics**: Computes dynamic weights for ensemble combination.
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’### 1.5 EnsembleNode: Path Combination
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’```typescript
   125вҶ’interface EnsembleNode extends Node {
   126вҶ’  type: 'EnsembleNode',
   127вҶ’  id: NodeId,
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’  // Inputs
   130вҶ’  paths: [Vec<f64>, Vec<f64>, Vec<f64>],  // [z_a, z_b, z_c]
   131вҶ’  weights: {alpha: f64, beta: f64, gamma: f64},
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’  // Output
   134вҶ’  result: Vec<f64>,                 // z_ens = ОұВ·z_a + ОІВ·z_b + ОіВ·z_c
   135вҶ’
   136вҶ’  // Contribution analysis
   137вҶ’  contributionA: Vec<f64>,          // Оұ В· z_a
   138вҶ’  contributionB: Vec<f64>,          // ОІ В· z_b
   139вҶ’  contributionC: Vec<f64>,          // Оі В· z_c
   140вҶ’
   141вҶ’  // Magnitude
   142вҶ’  magnitude: f64,                   // вҖ–z_ensвҖ–вӮӮ
   143вҶ’  normalized: Vec<f64>,             // z_ens / вҖ–z_ensвҖ–вӮӮ
   144вҶ’
   145вҶ’  // Next stages
   146вҶ’  nextCritique: CritiqueNode,
   147вҶ’}
   148вҶ’```
   149вҶ’
   150вҶ’**Semantics**: Linearly combines the three paths with learned weights.
   151вҶ’
   152вҶ’### 1.6 CritiqueNode: Self-Evaluation
   153вҶ’
   154вҶ’```typescript
   155вҶ’interface CritiqueNode extends Node {
   156вҶ’  type: 'CritiqueNode',
   157вҶ’  id: NodeId,
   158вҶ’
   159вҶ’  // Critique network
   160вҶ’  network: {
   161вҶ’    hidden1?: Vec<f64>,
   162вҶ’    hidden2?: Vec<f64>,
   163вҶ’  },
   164вҶ’  weights: {
   165вҶ’    w1: Matrix,                     // WвӮҒ вҲҲ в„қ^(m'Г—m)
   166вҶ’    w2?: Matrix,                    // WвӮӮ вҲҲ в„қ^(m'Г—m')
   167вҶ’    wFinal: Vec<f64>,               // WвӮғ вҲҲ в„қ^(1Г—m')
   168вҶ’  },
   169вҶ’  biases: {
   170вҶ’    b1: Vec<f64>,
   171вҶ’    b2?: Vec<f64>,
   172вҶ’    bFinal: f64,
   173вҶ’  },
   174вҶ’
   175вҶ’  // Input and output
   176вҶ’  input: Vec<f64>,                  // z_ens
   177вҶ’  confidence: f64,                  // Оҙ вҲҲ [-1, 1]
   178вҶ’
   179вҶ’  // Interpretation
   180вҶ’  confidenceCategory: 'veryLow' | 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'veryHigh',
   181вҶ’  shouldRetry: boolean,             // if |Оҙ| < threshold_low
   182вҶ’  reweightSuggestion?: {            // if retry
   183вҶ’    alphaNew: f64,
   184вҶ’    betaNew: f64,
   185вҶ’    gammaPrev: f64,
   186вҶ’  },
   187вҶ’
   188вҶ’  // Next
   189вҶ’  nextSample: SampleNode,
   190вҶ’}
   191вҶ’```
   192вҶ’
   193вҶ’**Semantics**: Evaluates confidence in the current ensemble result. Triggers retry if needed.
   194вҶ’
   195вҶ’### 1.7 SampleNode: Probabilistic Selection
   196вҶ’
   197вҶ’```typescript
   198вҶ’interface SampleNode extends Node {
   199вҶ’  type: 'SampleNode',
   200вҶ’  id: NodeId,
   201вҶ’
   202вҶ’  // Input
   203вҶ’  latent: Vec<f64>,                 // z_ens
   204вҶ’
   205вҶ’  // Distribution computation
   206вҶ’  vocabWeights: Matrix,             // W_vocab вҲҲ в„қ^(|V|Г—m)
   207вҶ’  vocabBias: Vec<f64>,              // b_vocab вҲҲ в„қ^|V|
   208вҶ’  logits: Vec<f64>,                 // logits_tokens
   209вҶ’
   210вҶ’  // Probability
   211вҶ’  distribution: Vec<f64>,           // p вҲҲ [0,1]^|V|
   212вҶ’  temperature: f64,                 // T for softmax sharpness
   213вҶ’
   214вҶ’  // Threshold-based filtering
   215вҶ’  threshold: f64,                   // Оё
   216вҶ’  candidates: number[],             // indices where p_i > Оё
   217вҶ’  candidateProbabilities: Vec<f64>, // renormalized
   218вҶ’
   219вҶ’  // Sampled token
   220вҶ’  sampledTokenIndex: number,        // token id
   221вҶ’  sampledTokenProb: f64,            // p[token_id]
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’  // Next
   224вҶ’  nextDetokenize: DetokenizeNode,
   225вҶ’}
   226вҶ’```
   227вҶ’
   228вҶ’**Semantics**: Samples next token from confidence-weighted distribution.
   229вҶ’
   230вҶ’### 1.8 DetokenizeNode: Output Generation
   231вҶ’
   232вҶ’```typescript
   233вҶ’interface DetokenizeNode extends Node {
   234вҶ’  type: 'DetokenizeNode',
   235вҶ’  id: NodeId,
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’  // Input
   238вҶ’  latent: Vec<f64>,                 // z_ens
   239вҶ’  previousTokens: string[],         // context for korean generation
   240вҶ’
   241вҶ’  // Korean morphology
   242вҶ’  morphemes: {
   243вҶ’    stem: string,
   244вҶ’    pos: PartOfSpeech,
   245вҶ’    affixes: string[],
   246вҶ’    particles: string[],
   247вҶ’  },
   248вҶ’
   249вҶ’  // Linguistic processing
   250вҶ’  dependency: DependencyStructure,
   251вҶ’  clauses: Clause[],
   252вҶ’
   253вҶ’  // Output
   254вҶ’  koreanText: string,               // detokenized korean
   255вҶ’  confidence: f64,                  // in surface realization
   256вҶ’
   257вҶ’  // For iteration
   258вҶ’  tokenCount: number,
   259вҶ’  isComplete: boolean,              // end of sequence?
   260вҶ’}
   261вҶ’```
   262вҶ’
   263вҶ’**Semantics**: Converts latent z_ens into coherent Korean text.
   264вҶ’
   265вҶ’## 2. Recursive Tree Structure
   266вҶ’
   267вҶ’### 2.1 Complete Program Tree
   268вҶ’
   269вҶ’```
   270вҶ’Program:
   271вҶ’  в””в”Җ QueryNode
   272вҶ’      в””в”Җ LatentNode
   273вҶ’          в”ңв”Җ PathNode_A в”Җв”җ
   274вҶ’          в”ңв”Җ PathNode_B  в”ңв”Җ WeightNode в”Җв”җ
   275вҶ’          в”ңв”Җ PathNode_C в”Җв”ҳ              в”Ӯ
   276вҶ’          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җ EnsembleNode
   277вҶ’                                              в””в”Җ CritiqueNode
   278вҶ’                                                  в””в”Җ SampleNode
   279вҶ’                                                      в””в”Җ DetokenizeNode
   280вҶ’                                                          [Iteration loop]
   281вҶ’```
   282вҶ’
   283вҶ’### 2.2 Iteration for Multi-Token Generation
   284вҶ’
   285вҶ’```
   286вҶ’Program (for sequence length L):
   287вҶ’  в””в”Җ QueryNode (input)
   288вҶ’      в””в”Җ LatentNode (encode once)
   289вҶ’          в””в”Җ [Loop i = 1 to L]
   290вҶ’              в”ңв”Җ Iteration_i
   291вҶ’              в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җ PathNode_A в”Җв”җ
   292вҶ’              в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җ PathNode_B  в”ңв”Җ WeightNode в”Җв”җ
   293вҶ’              в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җ PathNode_C в”Җв”ҳ              в”Ӯ
   294вҶ’              в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җ EnsembleNode
   295вҶ’              в”Ӯ                                     в””в”Җ CritiqueNode
   296вҶ’              в”Ӯ                                         в””в”Җ SampleNode
   297вҶ’              в”Ӯ                                             в””в”Җ DetokenizeNode_i
   298вҶ’              в”Ӯ
   299вҶ’              в””в”Җ [Update context for next iteration]
   300вҶ’```
   301вҶ’
   302вҶ’### 2.3 Recursive Sub-Programs (PostMindLang)
   303вҶ’
   304вҶ’For future extensions, allow recursive calls:
   305вҶ’
   306вҶ’```typescript
   307вҶ’interface RecursiveCallNode extends Node {
   308вҶ’  type: 'RecursiveCallNode',
   309вҶ’  id: NodeId,
   310вҶ’
   311вҶ’  // Sub-program reference
   312вҶ’  subProgramId: string,             // name of sub-program
   313вҶ’  subProgram: Program,              // AST of sub-program
   314вҶ’
   315вҶ’  // Arguments
   316вҶ’  arguments: Vec<f64>[],            // latent vectors passed
   317вҶ’
   318вҶ’  // Return value
   319вҶ’  result: Vec<f64>,                 // latent from sub-program
   320вҶ’
   321вҶ’  // Recursion depth
   322вҶ’  depth: number,
   323вҶ’  maxDepth: number,
   324вҶ’}
   325вҶ’```
   326вҶ’
   327вҶ’## 3. Type Annotations
   328вҶ’
   329вҶ’### 3.1 Basic Types
   330вҶ’
   331вҶ’```typescript
   332вҶ’// Primitive types
   333вҶ’type f64 = number;                  // 64-bit float
   334вҶ’type i32 = number;                  // 32-bit int
   335вҶ’type bool = boolean;
   336вҶ’
   337вҶ’// Vector types
   338вҶ’type Vec<T> = T[];
   339вҶ’type Vec<f64> = number[];
   340вҶ’type Matrix = number[][];
   341вҶ’
   342вҶ’// Probability types
   343вҶ’type Probability = f64;             // вҲҲ [0, 1]
   344вҶ’type LogProbability = f64;          // log(p)
   345вҶ’type Simplex<N> = f64[];            // N-dim, sums to 1
   346вҶ’
   347вҶ’// Node types
   348вҶ’type NodeId = string | number;
   349вҶ’type Node = QueryNode
   350вҶ’          | LatentNode
   351вҶ’          | PathNode
   352вҶ’          | WeightNode
   353вҶ’          | EnsembleNode
   354вҶ’          | CritiqueNode
   355вҶ’          | SampleNode
   356вҶ’          | DetokenizeNode;
   357вҶ’
   358вҶ’// Special types
   359вҶ’type PartOfSpeech = 'N' | 'V' | 'Adj' | 'Adv' | 'Punct' | ...;
   360вҶ’type DependencyStructure = {
   361вҶ’  head: NodeId,
   362вҶ’  dependent: NodeId[],
   363вҶ’  relation: string,
   364вҶ’}[];
   365вҶ’```
   366вҶ’
   367вҶ’### 3.2 Type Constraints
   368вҶ’
   369вҶ’```typescript
   370вҶ’// Path outputs must be latent space
   371вҶ’constraint PathNode.output: Vec<f64> with вҖ–outputвҖ– вҲҲ [0, вҲһ)
   372вҶ’
   373вҶ’// Weights must form valid simplex
   374вҶ’constraint WeightNode.weights: Simplex<3> with
   375вҶ’  Оұ + ОІ + Оі = 1
   376вҶ’  Оұ, ОІ, Оі вүҘ 0
   377вҶ’
   378вҶ’// Confidence must be in valid range
   379вҶ’constraint CritiqueNode.confidence: f64 with
   380вҶ’  confidence вҲҲ [-1, 1]
   381вҶ’
   382вҶ’// Probabilities must sum to 1
   383вҶ’constraint SampleNode.distribution: Vec<f64> with
   384вҶ’  ОЈ distribution_i = 1
   385вҶ’  вҲҖi: distribution_i вҲҲ [0, 1]
   386вҶ’```
   387вҶ’
   388вҶ’## 4. Example AST Trees
   389вҶ’
   390вҶ’### Example 1: Simple Question Answering
   391вҶ’
   392вҶ’```
   393вҶ’Query: "н•ңкөӯмқҳ мҲҳлҸ„лҠ”?"
   394вҶ’
   395вҶ’Program:
   396вҶ’  в””в”Җ QueryNode (embedding: "what-is-capital-korea")
   397вҶ’      в””в”Җ LatentNode (z: compressed semantic vector)
   398вҶ’          в”ңв”Җ PathNode_A: analytical search through knowledge
   399вҶ’          в”ңв”Җ PathNode_B: creative associations
   400вҶ’          в”ңв”Җ PathNode_C: pattern matching from training
   401вҶ’          в””в”Җ WeightNode: Оұ=0.8, ОІ=0.1, Оі=0.1 (analytical dominant)

  Thread 3: в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҶ’ PROJECT_C в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ wait

Timeline:

  t=1-3ms:   PROJECT_A/B/C run in parallel
  t=3ms:     BARRIER (all threads synchronized)
  t=3.1ms:   ENSEMBLE (weighted combination)

**Components:**

   ```

  r2: Path B result (z_b)
  r3: Path C result (z_c)

  r7: Temporary/loop counter

Memory:

  - Heap: Growing downward for tensors
  - Registers: Fast cache for critical values
```

**Execution Loop**:
```typescript
while (!halted && instructionCount < maxInstructions) {
  opcode = fetch(PC)
  executeInstruction(opcode)
  PC++
  instructionCount++
}
```
